headline: US 💥 STRIKES Iranian RADAR 🍆 IRAN 🎯 BOMBS Kuwait BASE 😱
text: Strait of Hormuz 🍆🛳️ straight-up turned into a MISSILE 🔥 ORGY 💦 as US Central Command 🍆💣 dropped self-defense strikes on Iranian radar sites 🛰️📡 and drone command stations 🚁💥 near Goruk and Qeshm island 🌴! Iran’s IRGC 💂‍♂️ clapped back, launching ballistic boomerangs 🎯 at a US base in Kuwait 🏜️ but Kuwait’s air force 🛡️ intercepted the party 🎉 and no American personnel got hurt 😌! Kuwaiti sirens 🚨 screamed ‘hostile vibes only’ across the land while their foreign ministry roasted Iran’s ‘heinous repeated attacks’ 😤💢! Trump 🍊👑 posted on Truth Social: ‘Sit back, relax, it’ll all work out’ 😎✌️ adding Iran ‘really wants a deal and it’ll be a good one for USA’ 🇺🇸💰! Negotiations on a 60-day ceasefire and reopening Hormuz oil lane ⛽🚢 went sideways when Trump requested last-minute changes to uranium terms ☢️📝! Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman called the US ‘constantly changing its views’ 🤡 and said no nuke talks yet, just war-ending vibes 🕊️! IRGC warned ‘next response will be completely different’ if US aggression repeats 🗡️😡! Meanwhile Hezbollah rockets from Lebanon 🇱🇧 kept the front burning, with Iran’s FM Araghchi tweeting: ‘Ceasefire on ALL fronts including Lebanon or consequences’ ⚡️! Oil prices soared like crypto in 2021 📈💸 as the shipping channel drama threatened 1/5 of global LNG flow 🛢️🔥! Trump’s ‘final determination’ meeting ended in cliffhanger mode 🎬🍿 while both sides keep trading emoji-laden threats 📱💣!
